meaning: vt.设计,发明,图谋,作出(计划),想出(办法),遗赠给n.遗赠
examples: Experts are trying to devise ways to clean up the huge slick.
You are supposed to devise strategies to alter the cues and routines.
Your assignment will be to choose a discipline that interests you, and devise an experiment.
Over the years Nortel, Honeywell, Scientific-Atlanta and Siemens all tried--and failed--to devise reliable power line networks.
But it's through rational deliberation, not fear-mongering, that we can devise policies that will accomplish this.
